title: LCE Potion Bar - Classic
description: Brings Back The Old Legacy Console Edition Potion Bar.
body:
# LCE Potion Bar - Classic (LPBC)
LPBM Brings the old legacy console edition potion bars which show the stats of the potion on the icon. Plus adds bars for ominous bottles too.

**Potion Bars & Types:**

![Potion Bars & Types:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6651ca5e7a7c04657d50e582dee9e8ea4bb47309.png)

LPBM Potion Types Within A Chest, Displaying All Possible Types.

All Potions With A Effect Will Have A Bar, It Can Have Bars Ranging From 1-4:

- If it's 1, The potion has no modifers placed on it.
- If It's 2, The potion has been amplified with glowstone.
- If It's 3, The potion has been extended with redstone.
- If It's 4, The potion has an effect with an amplifier higher than 2.

On the ominous bottles the bars are for the potion amplifiers 1-5.

[Awkward, Mundane, And Thick Potions Will Display 1 Bar Like Legacy Console Edition.]

The Bars Will Only Display Within The UI.

Inspired by https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lce-potion-bar-modernized
